calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion Setting Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CLAUDIO S. BERMUDEZ.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $25,659.42
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $545.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $26,204.42
Judgment signed in open court.
